title: Resettable Trial Vaults & Spawners
description: Sneak and use the Trial Key to reset Trial Vaults and Trial Spawners.
body:
A simple Minecraft mod that lets you reset Trial Vaults and Trial Spawners by sneaking and using a Trial Key.

Particle effects will be triggered as visual feedback upon the successful reset of a Trial Vault, and the vault will become re-openable to all players after the reset.

This mod is server-side and supports single-player mode.
